case_title: HELEN TAN VS. ZHANG XIAO XIAO AKA CATHY XIAO

docket_entries.description: MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2010 - SMALL CLAIMS ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON JUN-04-2010 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 318. (206)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED MAY-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT XIAO, ZHANG XIAO XIAO AKA CATHY
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2010 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE TO COMMISSIONER SLAVIT PURSUANT TO CCP 170.6

PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON JUN-04-2010 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUN-04-2010 BY DONALD SULLIVAN. CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED (DEPT 318)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XIAO, ZHANG XIAO XIAO AKA CATHY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ZERO ($0). THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION IS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP426.30 AND CC1950.5(G). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TAN, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT XIAO, ZHANG XIAO XIAO AKA CATHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2010 - JUDGMENT.
